---
title: "IntroduĂ§ĂŁo a Disciplina (AF01: ADM 01139)"
subtitle: "AdministraĂ§ĂŁo Financeira"
author: "Marcelo S. Perlin"
date: last-modified
date-format: DD/MM/YYYY
institute: EA-UFRGS
format:
  revealjs: 
    theme: "resources/theme-msperlin.scss"
footer: 'Material de aula de AdministraĂ§ĂŁo Financeira - EA/UFRGS'
self-contained: true
execute: 
  echo: false
bibliography: resources/bibfile.bib
logo: resources/ufrgs3.jpg
toc: true
toc-depth: 1
---

```{r}
classtools::setup_quarto_slides()

l_info <- classtools::get_class_info("AF01", "202601")

short_name <- l_info$info$short_name
full_name <-  l_info$info$full_name
moodle_link <- l_info$info$moodle_link
gdrive_class_material <- l_info$info$gdrive_class_material
gdrive_first_form <- l_info$info$gdrive_first_form
gdrive_schedule <- l_info$info$gdrive_schedule 
gdrive_grades <- l_info$info$gdrive_grades
```

{{< include includes/01_sobre-o-professor.qmd >}}

{{< include includes/02_livros.qmd >}}

{{< include includes/03_sobre-disciplina_AF01.qmd >}}

{{< include includes/04_intro-finanĂ§as.qmd >}}

{{< include includes/05_sinopse_AF01.qmd >}}

## ReferĂŞncias {-}
